---
title: "CS211 Quiz 2 - Spring 2026 - Answer Sheet"
format: html
---

## Answer Sheet

| Question | Points | Answer |
|----------|--------|--------|
| 1 | 1 | C |
| 2 | 2 | A |
| 3 | 1 | D |
| 4 | 2 | A |
| 5 | 1 | C |
| 6 | 1 | D |
| 7 | 2 | B |
| 8 | 1 | C |
| 9 | 2 | A |
| 10 | 2 | D |
| 11 | 2 | B |
| 12 | 2 | A |
| 13 | 2 | D |
| 14 | 2 | B |
| 15 | 2 | D |
| 16 | 2 | C |
| 17 | 2 | A |
| 18 | 1 | B |
| **Total** | **30** | |
